description: catwalk has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or ethnic outfits. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic leather straps Ankle strap is elasticated for comfort Smooth footbed with embossed branding Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel with textured grooves Sandal Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
